movie.actors: Sean Connery, Klaus Maria Brandauer, Max von Sydow, Barbara Carrera
movie.awards: Nominated for 1 Golden Globe. Another 1 win & 2 nominations.
movie.plot: A SPECTRE agent has stolen two American nuclear warheads, and James Bond must find their targets before they are detonated.
movie.title: Never Say Never Again
movie.writer: Kevin McClory (based on an original story by), Jack Whittingham (based on an original story by), Ian Fleming (based on an original story by), Lorenzo Semple Jr. (screenplay)
